action.description: The specific Jira action to perform from the available tools.

project_key.description: The key of the Jira project (e.g., 'PROJ'). Required for creating issues and projects.

summary.description: The summary or title for a new issue.

description.description: The description for a new issue. Can also be used for comment body.

issue_type.description: The type of issue to create (e.g., 'Task', 'Bug', 'Story').

jql_query.description: A Jira Query Language (JQL) string to search for issues (e.g., 'project = PROJ AND status = Open').

issue_key.description: The key of a specific Jira issue (e.g., 'PROJ-123'). Required for getting, updating, commenting, assigning, or transitioning issues.

update_fields.description: A JSON dictionary of fields to update on an issue (e.g., {"summary": "New summary"}).

comment_body.description: The text content for a new comment to add to an issue.

assignee_email.description: The email address of the user to assign an issue to.

transition_name.description: The name of the workflow transition to perform (e.g., 'In Progress', 'Done', 'Close Issue').

project_name.description: The full name for a new project to be created.

project_template.description: The template for a new project (e.g., 'kanban', 'scrum').

user_email.description: The email address of a specific user to retrieve.
